<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\Concerns; use ErrorException; trait InteractsWithDeprecationHandling { /** * The original deprecation handler. * * @var callable|null */ protected $originalDeprecationHandler; /** * Restore deprecation handling. * * @return $this */ protected function withDeprecationHandling() { if ($this->originalDeprecationHandler) { set_error_handler(tap($this->originalDeprecationHandler, fn () => $this->originalDeprecationHandler = null)); } return $this; } /** * Disable deprecation handling for the test. * * @return $this */ protected function withoutDeprecationHandling() { if ($this->originalDeprecationHandler == null) { $this->originalDeprecationHandler = set_error_handler(function ($level, $message, $file = '', $line = 0) { if (in_array($level, [E_DEPRECATED, E_USER_DEPRECATED]) || (error_reporting() & $level)) { throw new ErrorException($message, 0, $level, $file, $line); } }); } return $this; } }
